violations.text: The presence of rodents and drain flies are not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings and live activity. A dead roach observed under tape to the wall (dishwashing area). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the storage shelves (cooking area) have an accumulation of rodent droppings, food residue, and other debris. Area to be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025

The condensate and wastewater from the ice machine and dishwasher are draining onto the floor. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Maintenance to adjust pipes to drain into floor drains. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2025

The floor beneath the ice machine and walls in dishwashing area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2025
Inspector observed a gap/opening to the ceiling and pipe area (mop sink room). Repair(s) needed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine and cutting board) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Machine was taken out of service washed and sanitized during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (prep unit shelves ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

Inspector observed plumbing to the fruits and vegetables sinks airgap in poor repair. Airgaps was unaligned causing leakage. Technician repaired during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

The floors in walk in coolers and back storage area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (outside refuse ) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2025
The following door gaskets were observed in poor repair. 1. Hot-Hold Unit 2. Refrigerator (2 door) 3. Milk Cooler New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer, mixer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024

Carrots were observed held at 124 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated to 171 degrees Fahrenheit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024
Observed soda gun to be leaking into a container. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024
The following door gaskets were observed in poor repair. 1. Milk Cooler 2. Hot hold unit 3. Refrigerator (2 door) 4. Refrigerator (1st floor) New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024

The plumbing throughout the kitchen is in poor repair. 1. Three bay sink (leaking from bottom pipe) 2. Steam kettle hose (leaking) Inspector observed inadequate air gaps. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024
Walk-in freezer was observed with an accumulation of frost buildup. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in dishwasher and food preparation area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener and ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food, pink residue and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener and ice machine taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2023

Burgers were observed held at 120 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Burgers reheated to proper temperature during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2023

The presence of roaches are not controlled as evidenced by live activity, dead roaches and fecal matter. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2023
Refrigerator and hot-holding door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the hood/ventilation unit, (walk-in cooler fan unit and conduit line have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2023
The plumbing throughout the kitchen is in poor repair. Inspector observed several leaks and inadequate air gaps. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023
